# BOGOODSKI.dev

## Site
- Name: BOGOODSKI.dev
- URL: https://bogoodski.dev
- Purpose: Personal consulting and advisory site for enterprise AI enablement services.

## About
Steve Bogucki is an independent enterprise AI enablement advisor — one person, informal in tone, technical in substance. He helps big, complicated organizations make AI actually usable: the unglamorous work of access patterns, governance, security reviews, data controls, RAG programs, cost visibility, training, and production support. His background includes helping lead AI enablement work inside a massive regulated federal environment, plus prior experience in software development, analytics, business intelligence, data platforms, and enterprise product delivery.

## Services
- Enterprise AI enablement strategy
- AI use-case lifecycle design
- LLM access and governance patterns
- RAG chatbot program design
- AI software and vendor review
- Executive and workforce AI upskilling
- Technical product advisory

## Ideal Audience
- Senior executives (CIOs, CTOs, CDOs)
- AI program leaders
- Public-sector technology leaders
- Regulated-enterprise teams
- Product owners and data leaders
- Organizations building internal AI services

## Contact
- Email: stevebogucki12@gmail.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/sbogucki12/

## Thought Leadership
- Article: "We Didn't Know What We Didn't Know: Standing Up Enterprise AI Services at Scale"
- URL: https://medium.com/@bogoodski/we-didnt-know-what-we-didn-t-know-standing-up-enterprise-ai-services-at-scale-cf2fd7f169c8

## Disclaimer
BOGOODSKI.dev is an independent professional site by Steve Bogucki. The views and services described here are personal and do not represent or imply endorsement by any employer, government agency, or affiliated organization.
